<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Submit artifact for review"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/artifacts/{id}/submit"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Transitions a DRAFT artifact to UNDER_REVIEW.

  as={"h2"}
